issues.title: Required canonical field is missing
issues.detail: Required field 'serious' is missing or empty in 'complaints.csv'. The 'serious' field is required to distinguish serious incidents from non-serious complaints.
issues.suggested_action: Ensure the source complaints file includes a 'Serious (Y/N)' or equivalent column.

issues.title: Multiple candidate files for same canonical target
issues.detail: Multiple source files classified as 'device_context': ['device_context_v1.json', 'device_context_v2.json']. All will be merged; verify there are no conflicts.
issues.suggested_action: Provide a single authoritative source file for each data type.

issues.title: Conflicting values for the same field across sources
issues.detail: Conflict for 'eu_mdr_classification_and_rule': structured='Class IIb, Rule 8' vs document='Class IIa, Rule 7'. Keeping structured value. Human review required.
issues.suggested_action: Verify which classification is authoritative and update the source files.

issues.title: Duplicate complaint identifiers detected
issues.detail: Duplicate complaint_number 'CMP-2024-001' found. Keeping first occurrence (row 0).
issues.suggested_action: Review source data for duplicate entries.

issues.title: Country value could not be normalized
issues.detail: Country value 'NL' could not be normalized to a known canonical country name. Passed through as-is.
issues.suggested_action: Use ISO 3166-1 country name or 2-letter code.

issues.title: Field value inferred from unstructured document text
issues.detail: Field 'intended_purpose' inferred from document 'CER_SurgiFlow_v3.1.txt' via LLM extraction (confidence=0.88).
